caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture, likely focused on systems thinking and modeling. The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is visible in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking. The main content of the video is displayed on a computer screen with a dark background, featuring a complex network diagram with various interconnected nodes. These nodes seem to represent different concepts or stages related to trial and learning, as indicated by the text "start where" and "learn modeling." A smaller inset image shows a circular flowchart with arrows connecting different elements, suggesting a cyclical process. The overall theme seems to revolve around understanding and developing models within a systems framework, possibly for educational or professional purposes. The video likely aims to explain how these models can be applied and iterated upon for better learning and problem-solving.
